rules: Color exists only to guide action.
Never use pure black or grey. Greys should be tinted slightly cool (Zinc).

layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Flat solid background with 1px border. No shadows by default.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-zinc-200), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-sm).
components.tables: Minimalist table views. Dense, typography-focused. Use sticky headers. Left-align text/data, right-align numbers.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#0055FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0040CC]. Secondary: border border-zinc-200 bg-white hover:bg-zinc-50.
components.file_upload: Drag-and-drop zone: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-300 bg-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors. Center align icon and text.
components.navigation: Sticky/Fixed header with Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border border-white/20). Must have visible links on desktop.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react (already installed). Keep icons functional, minimal.

motion.hover: Subtle border color change, bg tint, or -translate-y-1 for interactive elements.

image_urls.description: Minimalist architectural glass facade for the login screen split-pane.
Abstract geometric data mapping illustration, can be used in empty states or onboarding.

media.rules: Never use placeholder images. Use provided URLs only.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the exact component specifications listed above.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='login-submit-button').
Implement Shadcn components heavily for Tables, Tabs, Dialogs, Select, Forms.
Do NOT use pure transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; use backdrop-blur and semi-transparent white.
Ensure the table handles editable data (Data Correction Screen) cleanly without visual clutter.
Use Chivo for all Headings (H1-H4) and IBM Plex Sans for body text and table data. Import these from Google Fonts.
Prioritize accessibility: ensure text contrast ratio is APCA/WCAG compliant.
